sections.paragraph:
to overflow, followed by עַל to overflow any one, Lam 3:54.

Hiphil-

(1) to cause to overflow, Deu 11:4.

(2) to cause to swim, 2Ki 6:6.

Derivatives, צָפָה, צַפְצָפָה, and-

צוף

m.-

(1) honey as dropping from the comb, so called from its overflowing, Pro 16:24. Plural צוּפִים Psa 19:11.

(2) [Zuph], pr.n. of a son of Elkanah, 1Sa 1:1 1Ch 6:20 (where in קרי there is צִיף), and צֹופַי 1Ch 6:11.

[צֹופַח (“cruse,” from צָפַח) Zopha, pr.n. m. 1Ch 7:35, 36 1Ch 7:36.]

[צֹופַי see צוּף .]
